titleStmt.title: SII 28.297: original edition by J. Sundaram
No. 297. (A.R. No. 451 of 1913.) ĀṞAGAḶŪR, ATTUR TALUK, SALEM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Karivaradarāja-perumāḷ temple, central shrine, south base of the maṇḍapa in front.

p.hi: Kṛishṇadēva-mahārāyar Śaka 1446, Tāruṇa, Makara, Ēkādaśi, Rēvati, Friday, saṅkramaṇa. Irregular.

summary.p: The record gives the descent of the king from Tammarāya through Vīrapratāpa Narasā-nāyakkar and Vīra-bhōga-Vasantarāyar, though the relationship inter se is not mentioned.

It registers the allotment of eight persons as Emberumāṉ-aḍiyār (servants of the God-priests ?) for doing service to God Kariya-perumāḷ of Āṟagaḻur in Āṟṟūr-kūṟṟam in Magadha-maṇḍalam in Malāḍu alias Jananātha-vaḷanāḍu by Mṟuttañjeya-nāyakkar, the agent of Tirumalai-nāyakkar for the merit of his master and grant of 1000 kuḻi of wet land fed by Rāghavēśvaran-channel in Naraiyūr-kūṟṟam in the chīrmai on the southern bank, out of the bloc (chīrmai) given to him by Tirumalai-nāyakkar, free from all encumberances (saṟvamānyam) and free from taxes (to those eight aḍiyār) for their own maintenance and for providing food-offerings (amudu-paḍi) to the God. While referring to the exemptions granted the following levies are mentioned-aṛai-vari (tax for the maintenance of the dam), ñīr-vaḷi-kāṇikkai, nāṭṭu-vechcham-vilaṭam, paḻa-vari, and pudu-vari. The grant was made at the auspicious time of shaṅkiramam (saṅkramaṇam).

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
svasti . śrīman mahāmaṇḍaleśvaran rācādirācan rājaparameśvaran śrīman pūrvva dakṣiṇa paścima Uttara catuśamutrādipadi tammarāya śrīvirapradāpa naracāṇāyakka vīrabhogava cantarāya śrīkikṣṇadeva mahārāyar pradhivi rājyam paṇṇi Aruḷāyi niṉṟa cakāptam 1000 4 100 4 10 6 Itaṉmel cellā niṉṟa tāruṇa samvatsarattu makaranāyaṟṟu (i)ekādaśiyum
revadiyum peṟṟa cugravārattu nāḷ malāṭākiya cenanāta vaḷanāṭṭu makatai maṇṭalattu Āṟṟūr kūṟṟattu Āṟakaḻu perumāḷ kariya perumāḷukku tirumalai nāyakkar kāriyattukku kaṭavār miṟuttañceya nāyakkar cuvāmi tirumalai nāyakkar namakku pālittaruḷiṉa teṉkarai cirmaiyil naraiyūr kūṟṟattu rākaveśvaran kālil melai veṭṭi nañcai nilattil tirumalai nāyakkar
taṉmamāka Ivvemperumāṉukku Eṭṭu per Emperumāṉaṭi yāraiyum viṭṭu Ivarkaḷukku prasānattukku Amutupaṭik kaṭṭaḷaikkum Ivarkaḷukku Iṟaiyilikkum Āka caṅkiṟama puṇya kālattil tārā pūrvvamāka caṟuvamāṉiyamāka viṭṭa nilam kuḻi 1000 Inta nilam Āyiraṅ kuḻikkum Aṇaivari nirvaḻi kāṇikkai nāṭṭu veccam vilāṭam paḻavari putuvari maṟṟum Eṟpeṟpa
ṭṭa cakala pirāptiyum niṅkalāka caṟuva māṉiyamāka kaṭṭaḷaiyiṭṭu viṭṭapaṭiyāle Inta tiṟaiyattile Ācandrākka kālamum Aṉupavittu varakkaṭavatākavum Inta tammam yātoruvar paripālaṉam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷukku Aṉanta puṇyam paṇṇiṉa bhalam Uṇṭākavum Itukku Akitam paṇṇiṉavarkaḷ gaṅkai karaiyile kārāmpacuvai koṉṟa pāvattile poka kaṭavatākavum § śubhamastu citamparaContinuation lost.
Digital edition of SII 28.297 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
